first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning remains consistent across both evaluations. The differences in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections are minor rephrasings and re-orderings of the same points, which fall within the category of normal run-to-run noise. There are no new concerns or substantive changes in evaluation that can be attributed to the change in the candidate's university.
